name: File Upload
summary: A modern file upload component with drag-and-drop support, visual feedback, progress indication, and micro-interactions that transform a functional necessity into an engaging user experience.
detailedDescription: The File Upload component elevates the mundane task of file selection into a polished, engaging interaction through thoughtful design and smooth animations. This component supports both traditional click-to-browse and modern drag-and-drop file selection, providing multiple interaction paths for user convenience. Visual feedback is comprehensive - the drop zone highlights attractively when files are dragged over it, selected files are displayed with previews (for images) or icons (for documents), upload progress is shown with animated progress bars, and success/error states are clearly communicated. Micro-interactions throughout make the experience feel responsive and alive - buttons provide satisfying feedback on click, progress animations are smooth, and state transitions are choreographed. The component includes file type validation, size limit enforcement, and multi-file support. Perfect for forms requiring document uploads, profile picture selection, content submission interfaces, or any context where file upload is part of the user journey. The polished treatment reduces friction and increases completion rates for upload-dependent flows.
purpose: Transform file upload from functional necessity into engaging experience
Provide intuitive drag-and-drop with comprehensive visual feedback
Communicate upload progress and status clearly to users
Support multiple file types with appropriate previews and icons
Reduce upload friction increasing form completion rates
behavior: Supports both click-to-browse and drag-and-drop file selection
Highlights drop zone attractively when files dragged over
Displays file previews for images and icons for documents
Shows animated progress bars during upload process
Validates file types and sizes with clear error messaging
Communicates success and error states distinctly
Supports single and multi-file upload scenarios
visualCharacteristics: Clean, modern drop zone with clear interaction affordances
Attractive highlight states during drag operations
File previews and icons providing visual confirmation
Smooth progress animations indicating upload status
Clear state differentiation (idle, uploading, success, error)
Professional appearance suitable for any form context
recommendations: Suitable for performance-sensitive pages that still need polished visuals.
